processability.notes: Best machining polymer; tight tolerances possible

materials.name: Polycarbonate (PC)

materials.name: PMMA (Acrylic)

processability.notes: Cell casting for sheets
FDM; most common FDM material after PLA

materials.name: CFRP UD Tape (T700/Epoxy)
materials.notes: Unidirectional lamina. Primary values are fibre direction (0°). Use CLT tool for laminate properties.

materials.name: CFRP Quasi-Isotropic Laminate
materials.notes: Effective homogenized properties for a quasi-isotropic layup. Not a CLT input.

materials.name: CFRP Woven Fabric (Twill/Epoxy)
materials.notes: Balanced woven fabric laminate. Properties approximately equal in warp and fill.

materials.name: GFRP UD (E-Glass/Epoxy)
materials.notes: Unidirectional lamina. Primary values are fibre direction.

materials.name: GFRP Quasi-Isotropic Laminate
materials.notes: Effective homogenized properties for a quasi-isotropic E-glass/epoxy layup.
